title: DENTAL CLINIC - 211info
text: MCMINNVILLE CLINIC DENTAL CLINIC Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides preventative, general, and emergency dental care (exams, fillings, and simple extractions), dental hygiene services, and pediatric dentistry. 115 NE May Lane McMinnville, OR 97128 Eligibility: Unrestricted, must meet income guidelines if applying for sliding scale fees. Hours: Monday-Friday 7am-6pm Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call to make an appointment. New patients accepted as schedule permits. FEES: Vaires by service with a $30 per visit fee; accepts most insurance, including Oregon Health Plan (OHP), and offers sliding-scale fees for uninsured patients. Limited payment plans for emergencies may be available. DOCUMENTS: Insurance card, if applicable. Proof of income if applying for sliding scale fees. LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Yamhill County SITE HOURS: Monday/Wednesday/Friday 8am-5pm, Tuesday/Thursday 8am-7pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: YCAP transit route #2 Services: Cavity Prevention Measures Dental Hygiene Dental Prosthodontics Emergency Dental Care Pediatric Dentistry Periodontics Other Services Offered At This Location: FOOD - FREE FOOD MARKET GENERAL MEDICAL CARE - PRIMARY CARE HUMAN REPRODUCTION - OREGON REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH PROGRAM CLINIC If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. MCMINNVILLE CLINIC
